license.summary: Place directory metadata is sourced from DarkSky International public place records with visible attribution, per-record source URLs, and source timestamps.
license.termsNote: The script excludes page prose, documents, contact details, image captions, alt text, and image binaries. Featured media is stored as remote URLs only when present in the public REST response.

attribution.displayText: DarkSky place information courtesy of DarkSky International.
